title: nmap connector configuration
description: ACTIVE network scan (nmap). The scan target is supplied per-run via the authorized scope, not the stored config; this config carries only optional instance-level limits. EXECUTION is container-gated (ADR 0072 §1) — refused until a container sandbox is enabled.

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.description: Optional dataset label used in the provenance source_id.

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Optional hard wall-clock bound on the nmap subprocess, in seconds.

ports.title: Ports
ports.description: Optional reserved port specification (e.g. "1-1024"). Not wired into the argv in v1 (the scan defaults apply); reserved for a richer scan profile once the container sandbox lands.

allowed_targets.title: Allowed targets
allowed_targets.description: Optional exact-match allowlist (ADR 0072 §2): if non-empty, an operator run is refused unless its scope target is in this list. Empty/absent means any valid target (the per-run scope token stays the primary authorization).
